title: nepeta tenuifolia
intro: Nepeta tenuifolia, also known as white bee balm or white catmint, is a perennial plant native to China and the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to ease digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Nepeta tenuifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Nepeta tenuifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in potpourri or as a garnish for cocktails.
